name: Suspicious Access to Sensitive File Extensions
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Samir Bousseaden
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Access to Sensitive File Extensions
SIGMA Description: Detects known sensitive file extensions accessed on a network share

False positives:
- Help Desk operator doing backup or re-imaging end user machine or backup software
- Users working with these data types or exchanging message files

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.bak%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.dmp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.edb%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.kirbi%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.msg%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.nsf%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.nst%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.oab%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.ost%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.pst%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.rdp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\groups.xml%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Access to Sensitive File Extensions on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.bak%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.dmp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.edb%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.kirbi%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.msg%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.nsf%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.nst%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.oab%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.ost%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.pst%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.rdp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\groups.xml%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Access to Sensitive File Extensions
